name: Elma
description:
**Faction**: Harmony

Elma is a female dragon from the Harmony faction, the opposing faction of Chaos, which [Tohru](https://anilist.co/character/120970/Tohru) belongs to. She adopts the name Elma Joui as her human alias after she finds that she is unable to return to her world. Elma is the only dragon of the main cast who lives on her own in the human world.

Elma usually takes the form of a human woman with short black hair, large breasts, blue eyes, and a long spiral unicorn-like horn (which she can freely hide). In the anime and [Elma’s Office Lady Diary](https://anilist.co/manga/100756/Miss-Kobayashis-Dragon-Maid-Elmas-Office-Lady-Diary/), her hair also has purple tips. At work, she wears round glasses. She also wears a business suit which consists of a white shirt, light blue tie, a loose blue sweater, a grey blazer, and a dark grey knee-length skirt with light grey socks and black heels. Her casual attire in the anime consists of olive-green skin-tight trousers, a light blue jacket, a dark blue vest, and a yellow scarf. Her first outfit, which she also wears in her world while in human form, consists of a light tan scarf with a dark blue (sometimes black) leotard. She wears a purple kimono with pink piping and a dark blue sash over the leotard, with the top pulled down. She has bandages around her legs and sandals. She can be seen with a cobalt blue and turquoise tail (which she can freely hide). Sometimes, she carries around a long, brown trident.

In Elma's dragon form, she's a blue sea serpent with a brown horn protruding from her forehead and her brown trident is her tail. She can freely move around in the water because she is a water dragon.
